TierEnum.description: Generation tier — pro for highest quality, standard for faster/cheaper.
TierEnum.title: TierEnum

description: Input schema for Kling Video V3 Text-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the video. Describe the scene, subject, and motion.
examples: A golden retriever running through a sunlit meadow with butterflies, cinematic slow motion.
prompt.title: Prompt

tier.description: pro for highest quality generation, standard for faster results.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (3-15).

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the generated video.

shot_type.description: Multi-shot type. Use intelligent for automatic shot composition or customize for manual control.

cfg_scale.description: Classifier free guidance scale. Higher values follow the prompt more closely.
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to guide what to avoid in the generated video.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate native synchronized audio for the video.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

multi_prompt.description: List of prompts for multi-shot generation. Used when shot_type is customize.
multi_prompt.title: Multi Prompt

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generation. Use None for random.
seed.title: Seed

title: AppInput
